question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/repository/ContractResultRepository.java -> Scope: Medium: Theft of unpaid staking rewards'] [Function: findById(Long)] Can an unprivileged external user supply a crafted consensusTimestamp to findById() that corresponds to a historical contract execution which triggered a staking reward payout, causing OpcodeServiceImpl to replay that execution and incorrectly attribute the staking reward to a different account, leading to theft of unpaid staking rewards?
